message:
✨ Include versioning metadata in mission index (#304)

Add projectVersion, maturity, and qualityScore fields to index entries
when present in mission files. This enables the console UI to display
version info on browse cards without fetching full mission JSON files.

- 187 missions now include projectVersion
- 360 missions include maturity (graduated/incubating/sandbox)
- 388 missions include qualityScore

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
